steps.title: Use the surprise
steps.content: The discovery is surprising because wooden objects are highly susceptible to rot. The blank must explain that surviving for around 2,000 years is unusual, despite the preserved figure found in the ditch.

steps.title: Reject unrelated adverbs
steps.content: Choice A means strongly, which would make long survival unsurprising. Choice B means accidentally or without care. Choice D means merely, which does not express infrequency. The word meaning not often fits the context. The answer is C.
